hard_stop_findings.resolution: Hard-stop path requires explicit governance override. PR 1 implementation must obtain operator governance for harvester.py edit admission before writing L1 (line 1061) and L2 (line 1338).

topology_gap_findings.detail: Files span money_path_pricing + data_ingestion + forecast_pipeline + state_read_model profiles. No digest profile in architecture/digest_profiles.py (canonical: architecture/topology.yaml) covers this multi-profile cross-cutting change.
topology_gap_findings.fix: Add zeus.phase0_pr1_resolution_era profile to architecture/topology.yaml and regenerate digest_profiles.py before implementation PR admission can report ADMITTED.
topology_gap_findings.binding_yaml_update: architecture/topology_v_next_binding.yaml updated with cohort zeus.phase0_pr1_resolution_era and profile pattern extensions (src/contracts/**, src/engine/dispatch.py, src/strategy/market_phase_evidence.py). v_next admission reports ADMIT when --v-next-shadow flag is used.

notes: ULTRAPLAN D.1 expected admission_status=ADMITTED. Actual status is advisory_only.
